positive: Stylized geometric minimalist composition of a fox silhouette, sitting elegantly on a stylized, crescent moon platform. The fox is drawn with clean, flowing lines and sharp angles. The background is a gradient of deep indigo to ethereal violet, suggesting a cosmic night sky. Incorporate subtle celestial elements like faint constellations and blooming geometric flora (stylized abstract flowers). The composition must have high contrast, strong black silhouette, and a sense of mysterious wonder. Use a limited, jewel-tone color palette (indigo, violet, gold, black). Vector illustration, line art, digital print texture, highly detailed, central composition, perfect for apparel print.
negative: low detail, fuzzy, blurry, noise, watermark, text, logo, trademark, copyright, messy, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, artifact, signature
